title: Rename device - new name on the FMD disconnected card
scenario: Renamed device name does not persist on Find My Device disconnected card after renaming in Settings and disconnecting
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Tap on the connected device to open Device Settings.
Tap on the device name or the Rename option in Device Settings.
Enter a new name for the device and confirm/save the change.
Disconnect the device (e.g., turn off the device or disconnect via Bluetooth settings).
Navigate to the Find My Device (FMD) screen in the app.
Observe the disconnected device card on the FMD screen.
expected: The disconnected device card on the Find My Device screen displays the new device name that was set in Device Settings.
